title: Develop livestock health and welfare strategies
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop livestock health and welfare strategies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop health and welfare strategies for livestock

pcs.text: Monitor livestock condition and identify risks to health and welfare relevant to the workplace and local environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor livestock condition and identify risks to health and welfare relevant to the workplace and local environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor livestock condition and identify risks to health and welfare relevant to the workplace and local environment.

pcs.text: Develop and document a livestock health and welfare strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document a livestock health and welfare strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document a livestock health and welfare strategy.

pcs.text: Identify and arrange facilities and equipment required to implement health and welfare strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and arrange facilities and equipment required to implement health and welfare strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and arrange facilities and equipment required to implement health and welfare strategy.

pcs.text: Inform staff details of health and welfare strategy, treatment schedules, and workplace health and safety issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inform staff details of health and welfare strategy, treatment schedules, and workplace health and safety issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform staff details of health and welfare strategy, treatment schedules, and workplace health and safety issues.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop health and welfare strategies for livestock

elements.title: Implement health strategy

pcs.text: Plan and administer treatment according to veterinary guidelines, legislative requirements, and animal welfare practices and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan and administer treatment according to veterinary guidelines, legislative requirements, and animal welfare practices and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan and administer treatment according to veterinary guidelines, legislative requirements, and animal welfare practices and procedures.

pcs.text: Refer complex problems or signs of disease for specialist advice and treatment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Refer complex problems or signs of disease for specialist advice and treatment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Refer complex problems or signs of disease for specialist advice and treatment.

pcs.text: Carry out control measures to prevent the spread of communicable diseases
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out control measures to prevent the spread of communicable diseases?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out control measures to prevent the spread of communicable diseases.

pcs.text: Implement procedures for reporting notifiable diseases according to legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement procedures for reporting notifiable diseases according to legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement procedures for reporting notifiable diseases according to legislative requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement health strategy

elements.title: Manage livestock health and welfare

pcs.text: Integrate health and safety regulations, legislation and standards, and animal welfare legislation, regulations, standards and guidelines into the health and welfare strategy and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Integrate health and safety regulations, legislation and standards, and animal welfare legislation, regulations, standards and guidelines into the health and welfare strategy and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Integrate health and safety regulations, legislation and standards, and animal welfare legislation, regulations, standards and guidelines into the health and welfare strategy and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Analyse and evaluate health and welfare records
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse and evaluate health and welfare records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse and evaluate health and welfare records.

pcs.text: Check health treatment batch numbers and date of expiry have been recorded according to regulations and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check health treatment batch numbers and date of expiry have been recorded according to regulations and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check health treatment batch numbers and date of expiry have been recorded according to regulations and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure compliance with withholding periods for treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure compliance with withholding periods for treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure compliance with withholding periods for treatments.

pcs.text: Evaluate livestock post-treatment for evidence of treatment effectiveness and any further health problems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate livestock post-treatment for evidence of treatment effectiveness and any further health problems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate livestock post-treatment for evidence of treatment effectiveness and any further health problems.

pcs.text: Review treatment outcomes and evaluate processes for effective management planning and best practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review treatment outcomes and evaluate processes for effective management planning and best practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review treatment outcomes and evaluate processes for effective management planning and best practice.

pcs.text: Evaluate livestock health, biosecurity and emergency procedures in a review of the livestock health and welfare strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate livestock health, biosecurity and emergency procedures in a review of the livestock health and welfare strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate livestock health, biosecurity and emergency procedures in a review of the livestock health and welfare strategy.

pcs.text: Maintain records for health and welfare strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records for health and welfare strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records for health and welfare strategy.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Manage livestock health and welfare

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
